[blog]0:shellready

~/blog $ open reading-log

Reading Log

2026-06-26

life/readingwriting/notes

Use this kind of post for reading notes, ideas, or simple daily records.

Tags are not tied to folders, so the same post can sit under multiple topics.

:q to shell | Esc normal | i/a insert | j/k scroll | g/G top/bottom

~/blog/posts/reading-log.md >
